Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION
REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Votes.VoteType: Favorable refer to committee Ways and Means

Title: Authorizes the Power House Church to file an application for a real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor
Summary: Authorizes the Power House Church to file an application for a real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor for all applicable taxes from the 2023 and 2024 assessment rolls.
ActClause: AN ACT in relation to authorizing the Power House Church to file an application for a retroactive real property tax exemption with the county of Nassau assessor
